| The White House is attacking Dr. Anthony Fauci **again** in an attempt to silence him.

Trump pulled the United States out of the World Health Organization, downplayed the pandemic, _and now -- once again -- is viciously attacking Dr. Fauci_.

This is dangerous.

[](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7cb7/4bd7760e/5f8796b4/77a943bc/2587774611/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200715_3MC-3MO_none_RESND_2_savefauci&source=314_EM_FR_200715_3MC-3MO_none_RESND_2_savefauci&subsource=adcoxnet")
Dr. Fauci has served six administrations and devoted his life to public service. He put his career on the line to save lives -- _things would be much worse had he not spoken truth to power._

[We can't let Trump FIRE Dr. Fauci because he has a petty vendetta against America's Doctor -- Click here and add your name to stand with Dr. Fauci!](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7cb7/4bd7760e/5f8796b4/77a943bb/2587774611/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+We+canrsquot+let+Trump+FIRE+Dr+Fauci+bec&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200715_3MC-3MO_none_RESND_2_savefauci&source=314_EM_FR_200715_3MC-3MO_none_RESND_2_savefauci&subsource=adcoxnet")

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7cb7/4bd7760e/5f8796b4/77a94385/2587774611/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200715_3MC-3MO_none_RESND_2_savefauci&source=314_EM_FR_200715_3MC-3MO_none_RESND_2_savefauci&subsource=adcoxnet")** to make a donation.

| I am beyond excited to announce that we raised **$184,701 for the second quarter** , nearly tripling Bill Clifford’s $64,766 raised.

In this incredibly challenging time for our country, I’m deeply grateful for the continued outpouring of support for my campaign. We are all in this together. The sacrifices people are making all over the Big First are a beacon for the country.

I recognize that I cannot do this alone and continue to ask for your financial support as we press on in the final few weeks of the campaign. Your [contributions](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=710a80c2e4&e=a9d1410029) will be greatly used and widely appreciated.

All my best,

Former Lt. Governor
First District Congressional Candidate

name: Steve Chabot
subject: We’re #1
body:
Every family needs a fighting chance No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [We're #1](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-j/)
When it comes to obtaining PPP funding to save jobs in our congressional district, as compared to Ohio's other 15 congressional districts, we are #1 in every category. In this week's blog, I discuss some of these benefits that I have fought for and secured to help you and your family during these challenging times. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The REAL Threat](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-d/)
There is no doubt that George Floyd and his family deserve justice for his senseless death. Nevertheless, this past weekend was particularly violent in our nation's urban areas. Case in point, in Chicago there were 77 shootings and 17 deaths. None of these victims was shot by a policeman. And there were no protesters in the street. No statues were torn down. No autonomous zones were set up. And the press mostly ignored it. In this week's blog, I discuss this alarming trend in our cities (Cincinnati included) and answer the question - do these victims lives matter too? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Chief Justice Roberts Disappoints Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-u/)
This past week, Chief Justice John Roberts joined the other liberal Supreme Court judges to strike down a Louisiana pro-life law that required abortionists to have admitting privileges in a nearby hospital - another disappointing decision from a Republican appointed Justice. In this week's blog, I discuss the phenomenon of conservative judges trending left. Why do we never see liberal judges going to the right? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Police Reform](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-n/)
Last week, the House Judiciary Committee, which I'm a member, discussed the turmoil in Seattle and the aftermath of the George Floyd killing during our markup on impending police reform legislation. I wanted to use this week's blog to discuss some progress being made on police reform and to give you insight into what I think still needs to be accomplished. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkikukjd-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

body:
If you knew that the money you invested right now would make a huge difference in the fall, would you donate before you closed this email? |
---
Peter, it's Katie, Joe Biden's National Finance Director.

I'm reaching out for the first time in a while to give you an update on our mid-month fundraising goal, [**and then ask for your first $5 donation of July before tomorrow night's mid-month deadline.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.15_B3_katiep_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.15_B3_katiep_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Every day, my team talks to our campaign's supporters, and sometimes we get the question, _"it's only summer, why should I donate now?"_

Well, Peter, if you knew that the money you invested right now would make a huge difference in the fall and allow us to expand our campaign's advertising and organizing budget planning _right now_ , [**would you donate $5 before you closed this email?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.15_B3_katiep_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.15_B3_katiep_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

Because that's the truth. Every donation that comes in the door today allows us to plan bigger for this fall, and put more funding into every voter outreach program that it will take to get our campaign to 270 electoral votes and defeat Donald Trump.

And that's why it's so important that we beat our mid-month fundraising goal of 150,000 online donations -- thankfully, we're only 70,000 donations away!

body:
Join us! |
---
Peter -- On Friday, July 17, Congressman Conor Lamb will host a virtual Biden for President roundtable in Pennsylvania with community members on Joe Biden's plan to create the good-paying union jobs we need to build a resilient and sustainable infrastructure now and deliver an equitable clean energy future. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18279290/223229489/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.16_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=98a9f06e-76c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGE5ZjA2ZS03NmM3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbzL1rwfrCpOlVhJy_XnhenVjaIEXFQi8Tx_53gADOg=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Team, **Today, a massive, right-wing, dark money group launched over $200,000 worth of ads in PA-10 in an effort to prop up Scott Perry. ** [**We still need to raise $6,544 before midnight tonight to meet our updated goal and fight back against their dark money influence. Can you chip in any amount right now to help?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18279291/223229490/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.16_b1_te_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGE5ZjA2ZS03NmM3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbzL1rwfrCpOlVhJy_XnhenVjaIEXFQi8Tx_53gADOg=) | [HELP EUGENE FIGHT BACK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18279292/223229491/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.16_b1_te_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGE5ZjA2ZS03NmM3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbzL1rwfrCpOlVhJy_XnhenVjaIEXFQi8Tx_53gADOg=)
---

Special interests have made PA-10 a top priority.

They know Scott Perry can’t get re-elected on his record, because he has spent his entire career putting his special interest backers ahead of his constituents. And these groups are willing to spend _millions of dollars_ to send their favorite yes-man back to Congress.

**But we have something they don’t have -- a grassroots movement of people fighting for real change in South Central PA.** Together, we can fight back against dark money influence in our race, _but it’s going to take all of us, team._

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18279575/223232122/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI5N2YyMy03N2M3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Yg9FqfYULL8H8WVjSvzcHkN5S0b6OlSaySDLS_XxFw=&emci=66297f23-77c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=67297f23-77c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
This is huge news, so I wanted to tell you myself. Last quarter’s FEC numbers are finally in, and they show that **not only did we outraise Cindy Hyde-Smith last quarter — we more than tripled what her campaign raised!** As you may remember, Hyde-Smith outraised us in quarter one. So to be completely honest, we were a little unsure of what to expect in quarter two. That’s why I’m so proud of the strength of our team. Y’all came through. We did this, together, not with money from super PACs or corporate PACs, but with people who are fired up about our chance to bring Mississippi forward. [**Now — with just 110 days until Election Day — we must keep up the momentum. Will you please chip in $10, or whatever you can, to ensure we have the resources to keep moving Mississippi forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18279576/223232123/365558708?refcode=em-200716-outraised&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI5N2YyMy03N2M3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Yg9FqfYULL8H8WVjSvzcHkN5S0b6OlSaySDLS_XxFw=) Over the past few weeks, our grassroots fundraising team has been growing in PA and all across the country. In fact, we raised more money in June on social media and through text messages than we ever have before — and more than half of our total raised in quarter two came from grassroots donors like you. **That scares Cindy Hyde-Smith.** Our opponent doesn’t have a grassroots team like we do. Hyde-Smith is known for calling up Mitch McConnell and his corporate PACs to bail her out at the eleventh hour — but they didn’t even come to her rescue this time. [**So if you can, please chip in $10 right now to help our campaign meet this moment. Tomorrow is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and it’s important that we keep making benchmark goals to stay ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18279577/223232124/365558708?refcode=em-200716-outraised&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI5N2YyMy03N2M3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Yg9FqfYULL8H8WVjSvzcHkN5S0b6OlSaySDLS_XxFw=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18279578/223232125/365558708?refcode=em-200716-outraised&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzI5N2YyMy03N2M3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Yg9FqfYULL8H8WVjSvzcHkN5S0b6OlSaySDLS_XxFw=)
---
I’ll be celebrating this victory today. And I’ll be thinking about you, because you helped make this happen!
— Mike

And I’ll be thinking about you, because you helped make this happen! — Mike Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: The culture war is here. Will we win?
body:
Peter,
We’ve watched it simmer for quite some time, but in 2020 the culture war has truly arrived.
It’s between those who believe we’re an imperfect but great nation built upon virtuous principles and those who look at Mt. Rushmore and see slave-owning colonizers worthy of our scorn.
It’s between those who believe in free and open debate and the Orwellian thought police who demand absolute loyalty under the threat of public humiliation and personal ruin.
It’s between those who believe that all American lives matter \-- regardless of color -- and those who disingenuously use race as a political weapon to intimidate and establish socialism.
It’s between those who respect the sanctity of life, and those who encourage women to “shout your abortion” as a positive good while dismantling any and all protections for the unborn.
During my time in politics, there was usually an honest effort to find common ground. My how times have changed.
**I don’t know exactly how we got to this moment in America, but I know we must win.**
To do so, men and women of faith who believe we must recenter this nation around the biblical values must be informed, engaged, and relentless.
[The key organization on the front lines of recruiting, informing, and mobilizing millions of Christian voters in 2020 for all 100,000 elections across America is My Faith Votes -- and I strongly encourage you to support them with a tax-deductible donation today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200716apl01nd&n=1).
If you’re wondering if getting involved in this way really matters, let me tell you this.
For all there is to be angry about, remember that in the last few years we’ve confirmed a whole new generation of conservative jurists who believe in protecting life and religious liberty.
Well, if My Faith Votes had not recruited and driven millions of Christians to the polls in 2016, this may not have happened. And 2020 is even more crucial.
To prepare, we are activating 1 million new Christian voters in 11 swing states, equipping our youth on 300 Christian college and university campuses, and deploying an online voter guide for all 100,000 elections happening across the country in November because not everything that matters happens in Washington, D.C.
So my question for you is this -- if you agree that the soul of this nation is at stake, will you help ensure that the right side comes out on top? There is no guarantee and it’s not just about one election, but if we don’t get organized and active we will not have a fighting chance.
We are up against a very loud and angry mob, powerful corporations who’ve surrendered their boardrooms to “woke” identity politics, and a propaganda-driven media that does everything but tell the truth.
On our side, we have you and people like you. Free citizens who believe in this country and live by the Judeo-Christian values it was built upon.
[I ask you to donate to My Faith Votes right now because they understand the stakes and most importantly, they are effective](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200716apl01nd&n=2).
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200716apl01nd&n=3)
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200716apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200716apl01nd&n=5).

name: Margaret Good
subject: Team, this is major news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS

We just got the news...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18282845/223283588/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWMwZjU5Mi04OGM3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jjqH-z4cOBcuzVBmEwQBx16j0NgjJpcZdQjqkGH72A=&emci=2dc0f592-88c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2ec0f592-88c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644) Friends,

We have come to an important moment in the campaign: our race was just named a Red-to-Blue seat by the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, the organization which helps flip House seats. **It is now one of 30 targeted races across the country and the only target in Florida.**

This is big news because we win by building coalitions of support and the DCCC is a must-have organization in our coalition! Together, so many of us are putting in the work to bring change to Florida's 16th district and I am grateful to everyone and every organization who has stepped up to help. **[If you are as excited about this milestone as I am, we'd so appreciate a contribution to show your support!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18282847/223283590/1073285021?emci=2dc0f592-88c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2ec0f592-88c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&contactdata=9iBH6Oj20x9E%2FLWYnNyQiru%2BG3KGnNEi5%2BuAyWpWALdirg3JwzjwAN89gRLTNFteQmx6DOqX0ZOIFzjfU%2FlPXpGTQQBLXQAz2nTPq147vm%2BAuJyRhlsVYehPZVOV7ZpR19Jc0LWVpaqMRLmjxe0lRQ%3D%3D&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWMwZjU5Mi04OGM3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jjqH-z4cOBcuzVBmEwQBx16j0NgjJpcZdQjqkGH72A=) **

This race is key to expanding our Democratic majority, helping ensure a Florida win for Biden, and creating the change we need in Southwest Florida--and with the help of all of you and with the support of the DCCC, I know we can flip this seat.

Thank you! Together, we will make this happen!

Margaret Good

---
| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18282856/223283599/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWMwZjU5Mi04OGM3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jjqH-z4cOBcuzVBmEwQBx16j0NgjJpcZdQjqkGH72A=)**

name: WaPo Alert (via Blue Georgia)
subject: Loeffler (R) attacks Black Lives Matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
This is outrageous, friend.
| | |
---
_THE WASHINGTON POST_ : **"LOEFFLER CONTINUES TO RIP BLACK LIVES MATTER" IN DESPERATE PLOY TO HOLD GOP SENATE SEAT**
|
---
This is outrageous, friend.

Unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) is _doubling down_ on her extremist, bigoted attack against the Black Lives Matter movement - questioning the patriotism of its supporters and falsely claiming they seek to "destroy American principles."
**This couldn't be further from the truth:** Black Lives Matter is giving voice to the real problem of racial injustice in our country. Loeffler's decision to attack the movement and the WNBA athletes who support it is despicable - and it's a desperate ploy to stir up racial division to try and save her failing campaign.
**It's up to us to make sure she doesn't get away with it - and right now, the momentum is on our side:** New polling shows Loeffler (R) in a DEAD HEAT with Raphael Warnock (D) in Georgia's battleground Senate race - the election that _The Washington Post_ calls key to deciding Senate control!
**Raphael Warnock is the strong leader Democrats need to flip this seat and take back the Senate, but Republicans are pulling out ALL the stops to keep him from becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator.** He's building a people-powered movement to win this seat - and not taking a dime from corporate PACs - which means he'll only win with support from grassroots donors like you. That's why your support today is so critical:
[**Please, friend: Can you rush a contribution of $5 or more right now to defeat Kelly Loeffler, make history in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5c6/288179be/8442d1e/348e6db1/3931827031/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDQ4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk448-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

body:
Our new ad is on the air!
|

| | Team -- I'm excited to report we'll be airing our first television ads across Tennessee, starting today! | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0cf/18d6a294/4c8602bb/26d7f5cb/3085691094/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200716?refcode=jme200716_ad_other&refcode2=107423")
---
[_**Chip in now and help keep it on the air ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0cf/18d6a294/4c8602bb/26d7f5cb/3085691094/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200716?refcode=jme200716_ad_other&refcode2=107423")
I never thought I'd run for public office. I never wanted to see my face on TV. But I love this country, and like I did after we were attacked on 9/11, I'm stepping forward to serve in a crisis.
While our opponents are slinging mud in their expensive and white-hot-race-to-the-bottom primary, my message is simple. I'm running for Senate because Washington is failing Tennessee and we can't afford to elect another rubber stamp for the folks that are hurting our state.
Since I'm not taking any corporate PAC money, I need your help to keep this ad on the air. This campaign continues to run on grassroots support from folks like you, and it always will. I'm running to serve people, not special interests, and that's the way it should be.
[_**Please chip in today to help me on my mission to serve "All of America," and keep our ad on the air.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0cf/18d6a294/4c8602bb/26d7f5cb/3085691094/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MTYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYWQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200716?refcode=jme200716_ad_other&refcode2=107423")
In Service,
James

|

I never wanted to see my face on TV. But I love this country, and like I did after we were attacked on 9/11, I'm stepping forward to serve in a crisis. I'm running for Senate because Washington is failing Tennessee and we can't afford to elect another rubber stamp for the folks that are hurting our state. Since I'm not taking any corporate PAC money, I need your help to keep this ad on the air. This campaign continues to run on grassroots support from folks like you, and it always will. This isn't just about outpacing Trump's fundraising machine -- **it 's about being prepared for the fight ahead.**

We've got to make sure we have the resources to execute our national strategy to win, and we're competing in some pretty expensive battleground states, like Florida, Pennsylvania, and Michigan.

We know Trump's plan is to blanket the airwaves with whatever lies he thinks will help him win -- it's his same playbook from 2016 -- but our campaign is about something completely different.

It's about telling folks the truth and giving them hope that we can bring this country back together and put us back on the track to progress.

But, Peter, we need your support to get our message out, so we're asking for your donation ahead of tonight's deadline.

[If you can spare anything at all today, can we count on you to pitch in $5 and be the surge of support we need to hit this goal and keep up our fundraising pace for July?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B1_surge_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B1_surge_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Expanding to all 254 counties of Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
I'd like to share some news with you.

As you may know from previous emails I've sent you, our work to register
and turn out voters in Texas has gone really well, exceeding our
expectations.

Over the last two months, thousands of Powered by People volunteers have
stepped up to help us reach the Texas voters who will decide the most
important elections of our lifetime. Our volunteers have made over 1.2
million calls and, just since July 1st, have sent over 4 million
individual texts to voters across Texas. We're reaching out to all corners
of the state, encouraging folks to register to vote, and talking to
current registered voters in rural, suburban, and urban Texas.

Just this past Monday we had so many volunteers on our voter contact phone
bank that we made over 316,000 phone calls in one night.

In fact, this work has gone so well that we will now be able to
significantly expand our organizing and outreach ahead of the November
election. With the growing number of volunteers who've signed up to call
and text for us and the fundraising success we've had so far, we believe
we will have the capacity and budget to call and text every single
Democrat in Texas for whom we can find a phone number.

That's right — Powered by People will not only be working in competitive
State House districts, we will be expanding our organizing to every single
one of the 254 counties of Texas, calling and texting every single
Democrat to make sure that we help lead the largest voter turnout program
in the history of the state.

In addition, we will also continue to pursue a voter registration effort
that combines sending voter registration forms by mail with follow up
phone calls to likely Democrats who are currently unregistered. We've
helped register nearly 50,000 likely Democrats so far, and we're just
getting started.

This means that our Democratic candidates will be armed with a list of
confirmed voters, with confirmed phone numbers, in every single State
House district in the state. They will also be the beneficiaries of tens
of thousands of net-new voters to the rolls.

In the midst of this pandemic, unable to knock on doors, hold rallies and
town halls, and totally dependent on phone-to-phone field work, Democratic
candidates in Texas won't have to waste time calling bad numbers or Trump
supporters, because our volunteers will have made the millions of calls
necessary to cull the list of extraneous numbers and return a verified,
usable list of Texas Democrats that we can turn out during early voting
and on election day.

That will go a long way in helping our candidates win important State
House races and a new Democratic majority ahead of redistricting in Texas.
And perhaps most importantly, when the Biden campaign makes a decision to
invest big in Texas this fall (making the most of the clear opportunity to
win Texas' 38 electoral college votes), we will ensure that they can plug
into a state-wide voter contact database to efficiently and effectively
pursue turnout. This will dramatically improve our chances of winning
Texas for the Democratic nominee for President for the first time since
1976.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42674?refcode=ema20200716-97657&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=97657%2E444211%2EbLAIb6 ]But we can't do this important work without your help — and with November just months away, we
need your support now more than ever. Can you make a contribution to
Powered by People today?

Your support and your faith in our ability to help organize Texas have
made this possible. I hope you will continue to contribute, continue to
volunteer, and continue to keep the faith by keeping it going.

Yours in getting this done,

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20200716footer&t=1002&refcode2=97657_444211_bLAIb6&akid=97657%2E444211%2EbLAIb6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=97657%2E444211%2EbLAIb6

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Are you still with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed0fa/1567179631/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")
---

| | I am so grateful for your activism and support. Together, we are fighting to bring stronger leadership to the U.S. Senate. We are fighting for health care for all, racial justice, and an economy that works for every American family. We are fighting for a better future for this country. Running a campaign in these unprecedented times has been a challenge-- but I am so proud of the incredible grassroots force we've built these past few months, powered by people like you. Even when we can't be together in person. **Now, we are less than two months away from our primary on September 1st against a 47-year incumbent. And we need all hands on deck to win. So, I want to know:[Are you still with me?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed0fb/1567179631/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/are-you-still-with-joe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=2+-+Are+you+still+with+me&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")** | **[YES, I'M WITH YOU JOE!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed004/1567179631/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/are-you-still-with-joe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=3+-+YES+IM+WITH+YOU+JOE&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")**
---

**[No, please unsubscribe](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed005/1567179631/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=4+-+No+please+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")**
---
This campaign -- our campaign -- is fueled by the energy and activism of people like you. I'm grateful each and every day that you are a part of this.
Less than eight weeks to go. Let's do this.
-- Joe

| |
* * *

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed006/1567179631/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed007/1567179631/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed000/1567179631/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because Joe Kennedy is relying on you to help him take his fight for the basic dignity of every American family to the United States Senate. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request only to receive the most important emails [**here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed001/1567179631/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA") or you can unsubscribe **[here](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363906a7/55b66746/218b19e6/80ed002/1567179631/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")**. | [](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkma-all-email-july2020-upsellreeng?refcode=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=10,20,70,130,180&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")

Joe Kennedy has dedicated his career to social and economic justice. A former Peace Corps member, legal aid volunteer, and assistant district attorney, Joe is one of the Trump Era's most powerful voices for moral clarity in the Democratic Party. **[Will you help get his voice to the United States Senate by making a contribution today?](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkma-all-email-july2020-upsellreeng?refcode=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=10,20,70,130,180&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kennedycong&utm_content=11+-+Will+you+help+get+his+voice+to+the+Unite&utm_campaign=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&source=E4138-20200713-Reengagement1-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA")**

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Aggressively un-American
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
Last week, I wrote a letter to the National Basketball Association (NBA), because the league is censoring free speech Dear Peter, Last week, I wrote a letter to **the National Basketball Association (NBA)** , because the league **is censoring free speech in the name of woke capitalism and protecting their paymasters in China.** The NBA is encouraging anti-American displays, while prohibiting pro-troops, pro-police, and pro-freedom messages. While players are more than welcome to display left-wing messages, they are not allowed to speak out against the Communist Party of China (CCP). _**Why?**_ Because the NBA benefits financially from China, and if the NBA even appears to criticize China, the CCP will shut them out, then the money goes away. Earlier this week, I joined Fox and Friends to discuss the NBA's censorship. **If you missed my interview, check it out by clicking on the image below.** [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=63a6b1219008426aa4273ff36590a1d0&_e=3J-b7cuDVpRdzR3wK2CbM8787S2ckD89THfnxlVJ1IApd5y-T6OdBf5O_5_1hjgc0v7StStXWgp7riUiWkkXSibTNhS7RFippZ-xcxbQsUw3mVL5dlJMzUK0YOlYHtdUPR6T4sIbec6_KHZu1425BEzg2-Nlfp04qI3_st3G8_ObtN8V8Ccm8LT5X65J8WnsrmoBlSqvE6CxyMxtTBlsri8yHcKV83-Ns8ttDsRvVbIAzxegukxxu-eTprOdcIxOO4puY9tkP1huE87fyuFJTUNA_fWPwuvfs-Gv7Ahd8DSL07zBXl98uNxwz8ql9DnM0RZZvcZfJJlteFb2fAQrmIn6ZFvjU-iyiVDzSZdqlBiiCBpWxV7lYSqsZ6Qkn79mh2oGmBemipGdpVf5Urqr1w%3D%3D) | |
---
The reality is, the NBA rakes in billions of dollars from China and uses that money to stifle free speech at home. I am calling on them to stop standing with the oppressive Chinese regime and stand with the American people. **I need you to stand with me.**
[**DONATE HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=63a6b1219008426aa4273ff36590a1d0&_e=3J-b7cuDVpRdzR3wK2CbM8787S2ckD89THfnxlVJ1IApd5y-T6OdBf5O_5_1hjgc0v7StStXWgp7riUiWkkXSibTNhS7RFippZ-xcxbQsUw3mVL5dlJMzUK0YOlYHtdUPR6T4sIbec6_KHZu1425BEzg2-Nlfp04qI3_st3G8_ObtN8V8Ccm8LT5X65J8Wns6p6d6v8JbGdDsdvud0OAIeBSupdZ_KXGBXgSrSj9_6W-LcPv9bAuwMbig2AE0nR0ktEuMULLlaXffSD-cW8M7eVhd3KPFX68riO9SlEbxbLx5vTDouQrSNAT8RkcIwr5QA2khRhd9OKO2nqL2mrEa1DD5ZkWG6-VoScpUMmi5dxweA_qNeXXHdJrqhyG0Z4Z7g0KKJDMxLFhdp7R38IR2A%3D%3D)
The NBA’s actions are utterly outrageous and un-American. **_Since when do we stand with oppressive communist’s states?_** No amount of profit can justify the NBA’s actions. They must stop standing against democracy and freedom. They must stop supporting the Communist Chinese Party.

_**Join me in calling on the NBA to _stand with America!_**_
[_**Join our fight to****FREE HONG KONG****today >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=63a6b1219008426aa4273ff36590a1d0&_e=3J-b7cuDVpRdzR3wK2CbM8787S2ckD89THfnxlVJ1IApd5y-T6OdBf5O_5_1hjgc0v7StStXWgp7riUiWkkXSibTNhS7RFippZ-xcxbQsUw3mVL5dlJMzUK0YOlYHtdUPR6T4sIbec6_KHZu1425BEzg2-Nlfp04qI3_st3G8_ObtN8V8Ccm8LT5X65J8WnsjHE4VjG5hCg_HzZmnKzomSohP78FRSZ9-uee6EJSQpvAUTlNPojmIZPFn-0UkSwSE--7WcTNJx_AgEvrv38aFkG03pxtqBiGypyX-fdN23lIl-efPTFoOx-hjQRZjtRaF9tbDLSygS7UDKO5x19SWpN8lxxoKLQsAf7VaisGRWtBGeNnmcB5cqsWjGzi1ZPsbsqv4RuyVfdvvQe1bxrYPg%3D%3D)
Sincerely,

Josh Hawley

name: Mark Warner for VA
subject: within the margin of error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
we can't take anything for granted
|
---

| | Derek,

Democrats have been gaining ground in the Commonwealth -- and making some meaningful change! We're hoping to keep the blue wave going, but it's important that we keep in mind that Virginia is **not** solidly blue. As Team Warner charts a plan to Election Day, we're remembering the past.

We can't take a single vote for granted. **In 2014, Mark Warner won his Senate election by less than 1%.** That's why we're so focused on laying the groundwork now for a successful Election Day this November. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbd4/53d9897e/547fce73/1c885013/3349884802/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY1MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-winbig?refcode=20200716_f_1_nd__653__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
With the election less than four months away we're working overtime to get the word out about all the ways Mark Warner has helped move Virginia forward in the Senate. His priorities include:
* Making health care more affordable, including lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and protecting coverage for those with pre-existing medical conditions;
* Leading reforms to military housing, to make sure that those who pledged to serve our country have safe and affordable housing;
* Supporting job training centers across the Commonwealth so no one has to leave Virginia to find a world-class job;
* Working to pass a bill that would ensure our elections are fair and free of foreign interference;
* And continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make sure that Virginians have the support they need during the coronavirus pandemic.

While Mark is working hard in the Senate, the Trump campaign and the GOP are making **huge** investments to turn Virginia red on Election Day. _Real Clear Politics_ has even rated Virginia a "tossup" in the 2020 presidential election. It's critical that we reach as many voters as possible across the Commonwealth in the next four months to secure strong victory.

We need your help. **If you have the means, will you support Mark Warner 's re-election campaign?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbd4/53d9897e/547fce73/1c885012/3349884802/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY1MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-winbig?express_lane=true&refcode=20200716_f_1_nd__653__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")

clean_body: we can't take anything for granted | | | Derek, Democrats have been gaining ground in the Commonwealth -- and making some meaningful change! We're hoping to keep the blue wave going, but it's important that we keep in mind that Virginia is not solidly blue. As Team Warner charts a plan to Election Day, we're remembering the past. We can't take a single vote for granted. In 2014, Mark Warner won his Senate election by less than 1%. That's why we're so focused on laying the groundwork now for a successful Election Day this November. | "" With the election less than four months away we're working overtime to get the word out about all the ways Mark Warner has helped move Virginia forward in the Senate. His priorities include: Making health care more affordable, including lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and protecting coverage for those with pre-existing medical conditions; Leading reforms to military housing, to make sure that those who pledged to serve our country have safe and affordable housing; Supporting job training centers across the Commonwealth so no one has to leave Virginia to find a world-class job; Working to pass a bill that would ensure our elections are fair and free of foreign interference; And continuing to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to make sure that Virginians have the support they need during the coronavirus pandemic. While Mark is working hard in the Senate, the Trump campaign and the GOP are making huge investments to turn Virginia red on Election Day. Real Clear Politics has even rated Virginia a "tossup" in the 2020 presidential election. It's critical that we reach as many voters as possible across the Commonwealth in the next four months to secure strong victory. We need your help. If you have the means, will you support Mark Warner 's re-election campaign?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Thank you for your support! -- Your friends at Mark Warner for Virginia "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘Are They Setting My Children Up for Failure?’
body:
President Trump and leaders nationwide are pressing states and localities to do everything they can to reopen America’s schools safely this fall. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86010e1f13&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘Are They Setting My Children Up for Failure?’**

President Trump, the American Academy of Pediatrics, and other leaders are pressing states and localities to do everything they can to reopen America’s schools safely this fall.

The cost of missing school—especially for rural and low-income students—is staggering.

“In Jackson [Mississippi], like in many other districts, school officials essentially gave up on requiring remote learning last spring . . . Preliminary research suggests students nationwide will return to school in the fall with roughly 70% of learning gains in reading relative to a typical school year, and less than 50% in math,” Tawnell Hobbs writes in _The Wall Street Journal._

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0cb90a054&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “A planned ‘march against violence’ across the Brooklyn Bridge by police officials, clergy members and other activists was disrupted by ‘agitators’ who assaulted a group of officers, leaving one with a broken eye socket,” Charles Creitz reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7516306fe&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Federal authorities announced terrorism charges Wednesday against a leader of MS-13, continuing a nationwide crackdown against a notorious street gang that President Donald Trump described as ‘vile and evil,’” Jim Mustian reports. “‘We believe the monsters who murder children should be put to death,’ Trump told reporters at the White House.” Read more in [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3779b7dcb&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “Bari Weiss, a high-profile editor and writer for the New York Times opinion section, resigned Monday, citing what she said was unchecked bullying from colleagues and depicting the news organization as a place where the free exchange of ideas was no longer welcome,” Jeffrey Trachtenberg and Lukas Alpert write in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23b129546f&e=3ee4985eea).

**READ THE LETTER** : [“Showing up for work as a centrist . . . should not require bravery”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abe7ea5f38&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4427f1cbfc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e58405f8d0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5a296fd761)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Fwd: Trump's visit today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The GOP is panicking. |
---
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw my note from last night and ask a quick favor:

**I am neck and neck with my opponent, corrupt GOP Senator David Perdue, in the polls -- and we now need to grow our campaign _quickly_ to build a lead and WIN.**

**[So if you're able at this critical moment, please pitch in $10 or any amount right now>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2146/5b2c1286/3db9f641/25f157e0/319558860/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_15_trump_visited_ga?refcode=em_2020_07_16_trump_visited_k&amount=10&amounts=10,25,100,500,1000,2800,5600")**
| | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2146/5b2c1286/3db9f641/25f157e0/319558860/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_15_trump_visited_ga?refcode=em_2020_07_16_trump_visited_k&amount=10&amounts=10,25,100,500,1000,2800,5600")
---

Thanks for being part of this,

Jon

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

From: Jon Ossoff (personal)
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Date: Wednesday, July 15
Subject: Re: Trump's visit today

Friend, I wanted to write to you personally to reflect on Donald Trump's visit to Georgia today.

**Georgia's hospitalizations are skyrocketing, thousands are dead, and millions of Georgians are out of work, facing eviction or foreclosure, and in need of fast economic relief.**

**Yet instead of presenting a plan to solve this unprecedented health and economic crisis, Trump flew down on Air Force One today for a taxpayer-funded photo op with my opponent, Sen. David Perdue.**

_The President barely mentioned the pandemic. Frankly, the whole scene was surreal._

Trump wasn't wearing a mask, the crowd was packed in, and the President spent most of his time raging against mail-in ballots and boasting about infrastructure, an issue he and my opponent have neglected for *three and a half years.*

**Friend, Donald Trump and David Perdue are living in the twilight zone. They're in denial and out of control. They can't deal with reality. They can't bring themselves to address the greatest crisis our country has faced in decades, which has spiraled out of control.**

MEANWHILE ... while Trump was ignoring the pandemic today and praising David Perdue, I held a virtual town hall to answer voters' questions about COVID-19 in Georgia.

**I said it during the town hall and I will say it again to you, now: America should be the world leader in fighting the virus.**

But, tragically our leaders have totally failed us.
**Now, more than ever, it's time for new leadership in Washington.**
**[So will you make a $10 donation to send Senator David Perdue into retirement and secure a majority in the U.S. Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2146/5b2c1286/3db9f641/25f157e2/319558860/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_15_trump_visited_ga?refcode=em_2020_07_16_trump_visited_k&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")**

| [Chip in $10 to my campaign >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2146/5b2c1286/3db9f641/25f157e2/319558860/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_15_trump_visited_ga?refcode=em_2020_07_16_trump_visited_k&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")
---

For Donald Trump to visit our state -- where hospitalizations are surging -- just to ignore the public health crisis and score a campaign photo op is shameful.

To fly here and _not even address_ the more than 123,000 confirmed cases and 3,000 deaths in Georgia is absurd.

**Friend, you and I both know Trump really came because he's terrified of a humiliating defeat in Georgia.**

**_Where is their plan to address the coronavirus? Where is their plan to get help to American families whose household finances are on the brink, or worse, because of this unmitigated disaster?_**

They would both rather pretend coronavirus will "just disappear" (Trump's words) than deal with reality. Because reality doesn't fit into their narrative.

REMEMBER ... In January and February, my opponent, Senator Perdue, was trading medical stocks while publicly downplaying the threat of COVID-19 -- too busy lining his own pockets to prepare his constituents for a pandemic.

_When Trump said today that Perdue is "a great Senator" who has "done a phenomenal job," is this what he was talking about?_

Just yesterday, the Trump administration ordered hospitals to bypass the CDC and send key COVID-19 data directly to Washington instead, where its credibility will be in doubt and could be manipulated to serve partisan ends. _That's outrageous._

**I promise you, friend, when I am in the Senate, I will lead and serve informed by science and facts. I will put public safety first and create health policy based on medical expertise, not my financial or political interests.**

**[Right now, if you can, please contribute $10 or any amount to help me defeat Trump's allies in Georgia and put Democrats in control of the U.S. Senate.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2146/5b2c1286/3db9f641/25f157e2/319558860/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_15_trump_visited_ga?refcode=em_2020_07_16_trump_visited_k&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")**

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2146/5b2c1286/3db9f641/25f157e2/319558860/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_15_trump_visited_ga?refcode=em_2020_07_16_trump_visited_k&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")

---
| [Chip in $100 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2146/5b2c1286/3db9f641/25f157e8/319558860/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_15_trump_visited_ga?refcode=em_2020_07_16_trump_visited_k&amount=100&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")

I'm grateful to have you on the team,

Jon

To fly here and not even address the more than 123,000 confirmed cases and 3,000 deaths in Georgia is absurd. Friend, you and I both know Trump really came because he's terrified of a humiliating defeat in Georgia. Where is their plan to address the coronavirus? Where is their plan to get help to American families whose household finances are on the brink, or worse, because of this unmitigated disaster? They would both rather pretend coronavirus will "just disappear" (Trump's words) than deal with reality. Because reality doesn't fit into their narrative. REMEMBER ... In January and February, my opponent, Senator Perdue, was trading medical stocks while publicly downplaying the threat of COVID-19 -- too busy lining his own pockets to prepare his constituents for a pandemic. When Trump said today that Perdue is "a great Senator" who has "done a phenomenal job," is this what he was talking about? Just yesterday, the Trump administration ordered hospitals to bypass the CDC and send key COVID-19 data directly to Washington instead, where its credibility will be in doubt and could be manipulated to serve partisan ends. That's outrageous. I promise you, friend, when I am in the Senate, I will lead and serve informed by science and facts. I will put public safety first and create health policy based on medical expertise, not my financial or political interests. "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" I'm grateful to have you on the team, Jon | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

| Friend,

Communities like ours have been through a lot over the years, but never the combination of urgent challenges we face today: a global pandemic, systemic racism, economic catastrophe for America’s workers, farmers, business owners, and families. Overcoming these crises will require leadership that is compassionate, bold and imaginative.

Pat Hackett is the clear choice to bring our district together and represent our community in Congress. She will serve our district and nation with integrity and with a real understanding of why we send representatives to Congress in the first place—to be your voice in Congress.

name: Team Sri
subject: Our general election strategy starts now, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

You’re an integral part of our coalition, friend.

And now that we have an official opponent in this race, we wanted to share some key aspects of our general election strategy with you. Here are the facts:

→ Sri Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant with over a decade of experience as a diplomat, traveling all over the world to support the American agenda abroad.
→ He grew up in a middle-class, immigrant family and knows firsthand what it means to navigate our broken health care system while caring for a loved one.
→ Sri is the candidate best equipped to bring common-sense solutions to Washington for the issues our families face.

That’s why we need to elect Sri to Congress, friend -- and why we’ve set an ambitious mid-month goal to mark our first achievement of the general election. Can you chip in now to help kickstart our strategy?

Chip in >> http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.16_ts_all&amount=25

Over the course of the rest of this campaign, we’ll be presenting two visions for TX-22’s families: our vision to make Washington work for our families and ensure our representatives are accountable to the people, and our opponent Troy Nehl’s plan for TX-22.

Our opponent is a fired police officer with a shady record. He’s destroyed evidence, lied about his record in a sworn affidavit, and is currently running a campaign aimed at motivating fringe radicals. However, none of this is going to stop the Washington GOP establishment from throwing money at his campaign in a desperate attempt to buy this seat.

Troy Nehls couldn’t be more wrong for our district, friend. Houstonians deserve better, and that’s what Sri will deliver.
Our vision for TX-22 is inclusive, diverse, and focused on the issues that matter. We plan on expanding health care access, not gutting it for special interest payoffs -- and we plan on ensuring that our economy puts Texas families first.

And as we head to November, we need to ensure that this vision prevails. We’re launching our strategy with an ambitious mid-month fundraising goal, and we’re just $1,201 short of meeting it. Help us close the gap, kickstart our general election, and prove to the country that we can win this fight.

Kickstart the general election >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.16_ts_all&amount=25

Let's get to work,
-- Team Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.16_ts_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3fb51ea5-81c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0/a79c3970-a4c7-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzljMzk3MC1hNGM3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1NrJWl86ox_1OP1eMf0clsO0OR4Z6Rp10AnnmfpJKU=&id=117373579 .

Chip in >> Over the course of the rest of this campaign, we’ll be presenting two visions for TX-22’s families: our vision to make Washington work for our families and ensure our representatives are accountable to the people, and our opponent Troy Nehl’s plan for TX-22. Our opponent is a fired police officer with a shady record. He’s destroyed evidence, lied about his record in a sworn affidavit, and is currently running a campaign aimed at motivating fringe radicals. However, none of this is going to stop the Washington GOP establishment from throwing money at his campaign in a desperate attempt to buy this seat. Troy Nehls couldn’t be more wrong for our district, friend. Houstonians deserve better, and that’s what Sri will deliver. Our vision for TX-22 is inclusive, diverse, and focused on the issues that matter. We plan on expanding health care access, not gutting it for special interest payoffs -- and we plan on ensuring that our economy puts Texas families first. And as we head to November, we need to ensure that this vision prevails. We’re launching our strategy with an ambitious mid-month fundraising goal, and we’re just $1,201 short of meeting it. Help us close the gap, kickstart our general election, and prove to the country that we can win this fight. Kickstart the general election >> Let's get to work, -- Team Sri Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#] If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Molly Keenan
subject: Falling behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our opponents were hoping this would happen.
| Friend, Wanted to make sure you saw Jay's message -- because our deadline is coming up tomorrow, and we're falling behind. This comes at a dangerous moment for our campaign, as even more of Jay's Republican opponents are up with attack ads against him. We're at $38,876 of our $50,000 goal, and donations are slowing down. Ballots drop tomorrow for Washington state's primary, and this is exactly what our opponents were hoping for: that they could seize this moment to claim we're losing steam. **[We can't let up, not now. Our deadline is tomorrow at midnight: Will you donate $5 or more right now to help us close the gap?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9713?t=3&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9714?t=4&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)

[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=11&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)
_We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=12&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)** Thanks, and take care._
Friend,
I wanted to give you two big updates on the state of the race here in Washington:
**On Friday** , ballots are mailed in Washington state for our primary election. Over 30 candidates are running against me, and **they aren't wasting any time going live with TV ads attacking me**. We can't waste any time, and we must be prepared to respond.
This race is officially heating up, and voters will begin casting their ballots in a few days. That's why we set an aggressive deadline ahead of ballots being mailed out on Friday. We have to be ready for what's to come:
**[We need to raise $50,000 by Friday at midnight to show our opponents we're ready for November, no matter what. Will you donate $5 or more right now to fund the general election fight ahead?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9713?t=13&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9714?t=14&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)
---

---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9716?t=16&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9717?t=17&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9718?t=18&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9713?t=19&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)
---
The election of Donald Trump in 2016 showed us anything is possible -- and that no election is certain. With just four Democratic governorships up for election this year, the Republican Governors Association has millions of dollars to spend and only a few places to spend it. Washington state will undoubtedly be one of them.
And you've seen the rhetoric around my pandemic leadership: My opponents are calling it "absolute idiocy," "beyond dumb," and "attacking us to death" for my role in making science-based decisions that are flattening the curve and keeping Washington state safe. I refuse to let these attacks deter me, but it's just a taste of what's to come with Election Day drawing near. This primary is really only the beginning -- and we have to be ready.
**[When ballots drop on Friday, we have to show our strength: We need to raise $50,000 by the end of this week. Will you donate $5 or more right now to show your support?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9713?t=20&akid=8101%2E868730%2E2dTGOx)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Sen. Susan Collins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Sara Gideon is ready to keep serving Maine as a U.S. Senator. But the polls show that this race is going to be competitive, and Susan Collins is a longtime incumbent who won't be easy to beat. That's | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e6/45c30650/1ccbdead5/66e84d46/1659117613/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
The people of Maine deserve a senator who puts them first.

They deserve a senator who fights to make our country work for everyone, not just the special interests.

They deserve a senator who isn't afraid to speak truth to power.

They deserve Sara Gideon, the Democratic nominee for this November -- not their current GOP senator, Susan Collins.

**Let's help elect Sara Gideon, unseat Susan Collins, and flip one of the key seats Democrats need to take back the Senate.**

**[If making a donation makes sense for you right now, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to support Sara Gideon and Warren Democrats so we can win big in Maine and across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e6/45c30650/1ccbdead5/66e84d49/1659117613/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT11F_EGR_END_E_20200716_V1S2_P")**

So, let's talk about Susan Collins.

In 2018, when she cast one of the deciding votes to give Brett Kavanaugh a lifetime seat on the Supreme Court, she said that he would uphold precedents that protect abortion rights.

How did that work out? Well, last month, he voted to overturn one of those precedents -- and now, he's got Roe v. Wade in his sights.

Earlier this year, when Susan Collins voted against convicting Donald Trump in the Senate, she said that he didn't need to be held accountable because he'd already "learned his lesson."

Yeah, sure, he's learned his lesson -- he's learned there are enough Republican enablers in the Senate who will let him do anything he wants. He's learned that lesson so well that last week, he rewarded Roger Stone with a presidential pardon for committing crimes to protect Trump.

Meanwhile, as Speaker of Maine's House of Representatives, Sara Gideon has been clear-eyed about the corruption that rewards the wealthy and well-connected, and committed to getting results for the people she serves.

Sara Gideon has helped protect health care for Mainers with pre-existing conditions, fight the opioid crisis by expanding treatment and prevention while pledging to hold giant drug companies accountable for causing this crisis, and stood up for reproductive justice.

**Now, Sara Gideon is ready to keep serving Maine as a U.S. Senator. But the polls show that this race is going to be competitive, and Susan Collins is a longtime incumbent who won't be easy to beat.**

**[We need to fight side by side as a grassroots movement to send Sara Gideon to Washington. Can you make a donation right now to support her campaign and Democrats like her up and down the ticket? Anything you can contribute would make a real difference in this powerfully important race.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e6/45c30650/1ccbdead5/66e84d49/1659117613/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT11F_EGR_END_E_20200716_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250e6/45c30650/1ccbdead5/66e84d49/1659117613/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNnIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxMUZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNzE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sg?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT11F_EGR_END_E_20200716_V1S2_P")
---

body:

---
Peter -- as you've heard already from us, tonight marks our July mid-month fundraising deadline. [**We 're 35,000 donations away from our goal, and hope that you can pitch in your first $5 to help us cross the finish line before midnight.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B2_newads_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B2_newads_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

**Now let us explain why this deadline is so critical.** While it has major implications for the budget planning that we are able to map out for the fall, it also has a major impact on how many voters our campaign's communications can reach _right now,_ including all of our campaign's advertising.

This week, our campaign released a new ad in Arizona, Florida, North Carolina, and Texas (yes, you read that right, we have ads up in Texas!) that focuses on America's toughness, and our ability to follow medical guidance and beat this virus, if we stand together. | [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B2_newads_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.16_B2_newads_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

clean_body: As you can imagine, it takes a lot of money to run ads across the country. | Peter -- as you've heard already from us, tonight marks our July mid-month fundraising deadline. "" Now let us explain why this deadline is so critical. While it has major implications for the budget planning that we are able to map out for the fall, it also has a major impact on how many voters our campaign's communications can reach right now, including all of our campaign's advertising. This week, our campaign released a new ad in Arizona, Florida, North Carolina, and Texas (yes, you read that right, we have ads up in Texas!) that focuses on America's toughness, and our ability to follow medical guidance and beat this virus, if we stand together. | "" Peter, meeting tonight's deadline is critical to keeping this ad on the air at the highest levels possible and getting our powerful message in front of more undecided voters in these key Electoral College battleground states. And the more voters we can reach today, the better our chances of winning this November. As you can imagine, it takes a lot of money to run ads across the country, so we need your help. "" Name: Peter Willis Donated to Biden for President? No, not yet. Suggested Action: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for standing with us -- and making a Joe Biden 2020 victory possible! We can't do this without you, Peter. JoeBiden.com | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Team Warnock
subject: Join us at our Volunteer Kickoff:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Hi friend,
As one of our top supporters, you know how high the stakes are in this election. We're in a fight for the soul of our country, and we are up against vast sums of wealth. But we have something far more powerful, and it's the reason we're going to win:
_**_YOU._**_
We will be successful because of __**you**__. You can help build a grassroots movement to turn Georgia blue and give everyday people a seat at the table. That's why we are so excited to invite you to join us at our Virtual Volunteer Kickoff on Saturday July 25!
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5db/288179be/840e2a1/348e7288/68606260/VEsH/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://www.mobilize.us/warnockforgeorgia/event/286869/")
**[Click here to RSVP, lock in your spot for our virtual Volunteer Kickoff on July 25 at 1PM and be part of our movement to make history in Georgia.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5db/288179be/840e2a1/348e7288/68606260/VEsE/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://www.mobilize.us/warnockforgeorgia/event/286869/")**
This kickoff marks 100 days from the November elections and a critical new phase in our campaign. Reverend Warnock will share his vision for Georgia, and talk about how we're going to turn Georgia Blue. He'll also be joined by a **surprise special guest** that you won't want to miss!
Something is happening in this country, but it's going to take all of us to finish the work that Stacey Abrams started. So, please join us on Saturday, July 25 and claim your place in this movement.
**[Click here to RSVP, lock in your spot for our virtual Volunteer Kickoff on July 25 at 1PM and help us flip Georgia blue.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5db/288179be/840e2a1/348e7288/68606260/VEsF/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://www.mobilize.us/warnockforgeorgia/event/286869/")**
See you Saturday!
Team Warnock
|
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e5db/288179be/840e2a1/348e7289/68606260/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
